zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Beatrice de Lindsay於1285年出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾克勞福德時，她的父親Alexander Lindsay Lord of Barnweill19歲，母親Lady Beatrix Alice Stewart Of Crawford17歲。她於1320年與Archibald Douglas在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安洛迪安別利其結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1352年5月2日在蘇格蘭雷福福爾厄斯金享年67歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Beatrice de Lindsay于1285年出生在苏格兰藍納可爾克勞福德时，她的父亲Alexander Lindsay Lord of Barnweill19岁，母亲Lady Beatrix Alice Stewart Of Crawford17岁。她于1320年与Archibald Douglas在苏格兰米德洛迪安洛迪安別利其结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1352年5月2日在苏格兰雷福福爾厄斯金享年67岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lindsay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Lindsey in Lincolnshire, England. This is first found in the form Lindissi, apparently a derivative of the British name of Lincoln . To this was later added the Old English element ēg ‘island’, since the place was virtually cut off by the surrounding fenland. The surname was taken to Scotland at an early date and is the name of an important and powerful Scottish family.
Irish: adopted as an equivalent ofvarious Gaelic names (see   Lindsey  ).

variants.name: Linzy
meanings: Altered form of Scottish, Irish, or English   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  . Compare   Lenzy  .

variants.name: Linzey
meanings: English: variant of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  .

variants.name: Lindsey
meanings: Irish: shortened and Anglicized form of various Gaelic surnames, as for example Ó Loingsigh (see Lynch 1), Mac Giolla Fhionntóg (see McClintock ), and Ó Fhloinn (see Flynn and Lynn ).

variants.name: Lincoln
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of Lincoln, so named from an original British name Lindo- ‘lake’ + Latin colonia ‘settlement, colony’. The place was an important administrative center during the Roman occupation of Britain and in the Middle Ages it was a center for the manufacture of cloth, including the famous ‘Lincoln green’.
African American: adoption of the surname in 1 above, in honor of Abraham Lincoln, the 16th president of the US, who abolished slavery.
History: Abraham Lincoln (1809–65), 16th president of the US, was the son of an illiterate laborer, descended from Samuel Lincoln, who had emigrated from England to MA in 1637.

variants.name: Linsey
meanings: Scottish, Irish, or English: variant of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  .
Americanized form of German Linse or Swiss German Linsi, see Lins .

nameMeanings.name: Beatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Beatrice de Lindsay was born in 1285, in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland, her father, Alexander Lindsay Lord of Barnweill, was 19 and her mother, Lady Beatrix Alice Stewart Of Crawford, was 17. She married Archibald Douglas in 1320, in Lothianbridge, Midlothian, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 2 May 1352, in Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland, at the age of 67, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Beatrice de Lindsay est née en 1285, à Crawford, Lanarkshire, Écosse, son père, Alexander Lindsay Lord of Barnweill, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Lady Beatrix Alice Stewart Of Crawford, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Archibald Douglas en 1320, à Lothianbridge, Midlothian, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 2 mai 1352, à Erskine, Renfrewshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Beatrice de Lindsay 1285 in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alexander Lindsay Lord of Barnweill 19 und ihre Mutter Lady Beatrix Alice Stewart Of Crawford 17. Sie hat 1320 in Lothianbridge, Midlothian, Scotland Archibald Douglas geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 2. Mai 1352 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Beatrice de Lindsay è nata il nel 1285 nel Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland, sua padre, Alexander Lindsay Lord of Barnweill, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Lady Beatrix Alice Stewart Of Crawford, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Archibald Douglas nel 1320, nel Lothianbridge, Midlothian, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 2 maggio 1352, nel Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Beatrice de Lindsayが1285年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアクラウフォードで生まれた時，父Alexander Lindsay Lord of Barnweillは19歳，母Lady Beatrix Alice Stewart Of Crawfordは17歳であった。1320年にスコットランドミドロスアンロスアンブリッジでArchibald Douglasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1352年5月2日にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアエルスキンで67歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Beatrice de Lindsay(이)가 1285년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 크롤퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alexander Lindsay Lord of Barnweill(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Beatrix Alice Stewart Of Crawford(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1320년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 로스이누브리지에서 Archibald Douglas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1352년 5월 2일 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 어스킨에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

mn.Naworth, Cumberland, England: Naworth, Cumbraland, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Beatrice de Lindsay nasceu em 1285, em Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland, seu pai, Alexander Lindsay Lord of Barnweill, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Lady Beatrix Alice Stewart Of Crawford, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Archibald Douglas em 1320, em Lothianbridge, Midlothian, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 2 de maio de 1352, em Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Beatrice de Lindsay родилась в 1285 г. в местности кравфорд, ланаркшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Alexander Lindsay Lord of Barnweill было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Beatrix Alice Stewart Of Crawford, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Archibald Douglas в 1320 г. в местности лотянбридж, мидлотян, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 2 мая 1352 г. в местности эрскаин, ренфрюшир, Шотландия в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

sm.from 1319 to 1320: mai le 1319 e o'o I le 1320

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Beatrice de Lindsay nació en 1285, en Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland, su papá, Alexander Lindsay Lord of Barnweill, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Lady Beatrix Alice Stewart Of Crawford, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Archibald Douglas en 1320, en Lothianbridge, Midlothian, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 2 de mayo de 1352, en Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
